emblems.emblem_desc:
Лично в тренировке проверял все вариации эмблем, именно эти дают самый большой урон и приятное кд на оцепенении. Если брать вместо эмблемы разрыв - трепет, то будет на 100ед меньше урона.
Если брать магические эмблемы вместо эмблемы убийц, то будет также на 100ед меньше урона.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kaditas AoE control from Raging Tide sets up enemies perfectly for Grangers burst damage. While Kadita locks enemies in place, Granger can safely follow up with his skills and ultimate, making them a strong combo for team fights and pick-offs.

counters.counter_desc: Kagura can poke and harass Kadita from a distance with her umbrella, making it harder for Kadita to land her combos. However, if Kadita closes the gap and lands her Raging Tide ultimate, she can burst Kagura quickly because Kagura is squishy. The matchup favors Kagura in lane control and zoning, but Kadita can punish mistakes with her strong burst and mobility.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Kadita Battle Stages

Early Game: Play safe, clear waves, and poke with skills while watching for roam opportunities. Avoid forcing fights until you have your full combo.

Mid Game: Start rotating aggressively. Use Flicker + combo to ambush squishy enemies and turn skirmishes quickly.

Late Game: Focus on flanking in teamfights. Wait for the right moment, dive the backline, burst key targets, then disengage immediately.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Agility Gives extra movement speed, helping Kadita roam faster, position better for ambushes, and find the perfect angle for her combo.

Master Assassin  Increases damage when fighting isolated enemies, which fits Kaditas playstyle of diving and instantly deleting squishy targets.

Impure Rage restores mana and deals extra damage when skills hit, letting Kadita burst harder while sustaining her mana for frequent engagements.

equips.equip_desc: for burst and a bit of CD reduction

hero.hero_overview: Kadita is a burst mage who uses ocean waves to dive in, deal heavy magic damage, and escape, excelling at ambushing squishy enemies with precise timing.
hero.hero_strength: Kadita strengths are high burst magic damage, strong mobility, brief untargetability during engages, and excellent teamfight disruption, making her very effective at ambushing and punishing squishy heroes.
hero.hero_weakness: Kadita weaknesses are her reliance on precise timing, vulnerability if her combo misses, limited sustained damage, and susceptibility to crowd control once her skills are on cooldown.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the best battle spell for Kadita because it lets her instantly reposition to start or finish her combo. It helps her surprise enemies with sudden engages, adjust the angle of her ultimate for maximum damage, escape after bursting, and avoid crowd control when timing is tight. This perfectly complements Kaditas hit-and-run, burst-assassin playstyle.

counters.counter_desc:
Cancels Kadita S2 knock-up + Ult combo
Makes her burst useless in teamfights

dominants.dominant_desc: Kadita laning phase is about playing safe early, hitting level 4 fast, then turning aggressive. In the first few waves, use Skill 1 to clear minions while avoiding damage, poking the enemy mid when possible without overcommitting. Once you unlock your ultimate, you gain a huge power spike—clear the wave quickly and look to pressure or roam, especially toward the gold lane where kills are easier. Kadita excels at burst trades and surprise engages, so use bushes, timing, and spells like Flicker or Petrify to catch enemies off guard, then disengage after your combo. The key is not staying stuck in lane, but converting your wave clear into map impact and snowballing through kills.

dominants.dominant_desc: In early you should follow your mjd later everywhere for guaranteed kills, and when she has ultimate or enough build, she can now roam in either the enemy marksman or their jungler and try to burst them down.

emblems.emblem_desc: Mage emblem for high magic damage and CD reduction, PYST for low cooldown on her purify and conceal, Rupture for extra penetration, and lastly lethal ignition for that extra burst damage if her combo wasn't enough to take them down.
This one is just the same as the other one but this is for Mana management, since LOW mana disrupts her playstyle.

equips.equip_desc: The basic burst build
This one for antiheal, which IN MY OPINION she doesn't need since she's a burst mage, but she lowkey needs it still if their enemy support build flask of oasis, and also for mana management. <3

hero.hero_overview: Kadita roam is underrated, I've tried her as roam in rank and it works soo well, maybe it's because of her burst damange which can also be suited as roam, just like Natalia, Kaja and Selena.
hero.hero_strength: She's an incredibly flexible and slippery hero with her first skill that can outrun enemies or chase them, her ultimate is also a good hit and run skill which makes her kit super unique, her second skill is also Avery good cc + aoe skill that can be casted from afar and catch enemies.
hero.hero_weakness: Her weakness is probably her fragilleness, well but I don't expect anything in an assasin + mage hero  but her basic combo is literally first skill + second skill + ulti combo which can be incredibly risky, as her max hp is just so low and enemies could burst her down before she lands her ultimate.

spell.spell_desc: As I said in her weakness is her fragilleness and how enemies could burst her before landing her combo perfectly, well this skill helps her a lot with that issue, if her first skill or second skill isn't available, she can just lock them down with purify and land her ultimate with no problem. 😎

spell.spell_desc: It's the best for Kadita

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal is the most commonly paired hero with kadita as tigreal's ULT synergises well with kadita's burst combo.

Kadita is one of the best heroes to pair with johnson. I personally believe that johnson+kadita is wayyy better than johnson+odette combo. Johnson's mobilily along with kadita's burst damage can melt enemies in a flash.
Atlas is also a good pair to kadita as atlas can pull enemiesband club them together while kadita stuns them and bursts them with her ultimate skill.

counters.counter_desc: Argus is a bad matchup for kadita as he can survive a full combo and still stay sustained to counter kadita.
Harith is just too quick with the dashes and can squish kadita with his damage output

dominants.dominant_desc:
Always unlock SKILL 1 first as it can be used for damage and escape in the early lane clearing phase. Kadita is weak for clearing waves compared to other mages but make sure to last hit the minions as much as you can to get extra gold which can help you in the mid game.

If you clear 1st minion wave quickly, rotate to gold lane to support the marksman but don't stay in the gold lane too long. Return to mid lane as soon as you see minions coming to the mid lane, so that you don't miss the exp and gold from minions.

If rotated properly, kadita can reach level 4 in 2:00 mins. When you reach level 4, assist the jungler in taking the turtle. Check bushes and stay hidden while the jungler takes down the turle. It is important to stay hidden as it will help you take down enemies before they realise what hit them.

Kadita shines in the mid and late game as soon as she reaches level 4 as her ULT provides her with insane burst damage to take down enemies. In the laye game when the full build is ready, kadita becomes a burst machine with her (1+petrify+2+3) combo.

emblems.emblem_desc: Yes, there are alot of combinations that you can choose for kadita but this emblem set is advised while using kadita because of the adaptive penetrative that it provides to penetrative enemy defences.
emblems.emblem_title: My personal assassin emblem this season

equips.equip_desc:
This build can be used in almost any match in the right hands.
This is the most versatile build for kadita in both low rank and high rank matches. Winter crown can also be used as a substitute for divine glaive.

This build is to be used by PRO PLAYERS ONLY. New players please DO NOT USE this build in ranked games as it requires tremendous amount of skill to master this build and outplay opponents with almost no skill cooldown

hero.hero_overview: Kadita is an assassin/mage hero with insane burst damage. She is one of the heroes who can fit into any meta because of her versatility in her skillsets.
hero.hero_strength: Kadita can instantly burst almost all squishy to moderate heores with a full combo, she has crowd control and also has an escape skill. Kadita can be used to outplay any hero with some practice.
hero.hero_weakness: Kadita is weak against high mobility heroes like ling, fanny and hayabusa as they can escape her combo quickly. But do not worry because with the right spell and items, you can always burst your opponents.

data.recommend: This KADITA guide will help new players and also pro players in ALL RANKS

spell.spell_desc:
PETRIFY is the most famous spell to be coupled with KADITA because it can stun enemies long enough for kadita to complete her combo.

Combo: 
When pursuing an enemy hero, use the 1st skill to close down the distance from the enemy and when you're near enough, PETRIFY the enemy so they won't be able to move. At the time you petrify the enemy, quickly press the 2nd skill to stun the enemy in the air. When the enemy is stunned, use the 3rd skill to burst down the enemy and make sure that kadita is as close as possible to the target enemy while using the 3rd skill.

PETRIFY can also be used as an escape spell, for example, when Yin tries to ULT, you can petrify him to cancel his ULT and burst him down with your skills.

Although petrify is the most common spell for kadita, even FLICLER can be used instead but using FLICKER requires practice and quick hands to execute a combo.

data.title: Kadita damage

cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Personally, this is the most fun synergy. i have a friend who plays carmilla, most games i can get maniac or savage

carm ult + stun combined with Kadita's 1st, petrify, 2nd, youll be seeing petrified flying heroes - use ult to drop the water nuke!

counters.counter_desc: with experience, ling takes this spot. with his dashes and ultimate and invulnerability, he's pretty hard to deal with when using kadita

dominants.dominant_desc:
Make sure to be on the look out for enemy mm or mage or even the core if squishy enough. target those key heroes to give your team an advantage. be wary of cc and your 1, 2 use
you won't be cc immune with the 1, 2 combo
if going in with 2 or more enemies with cc, use 1+petrify + ult instead
make sure to secure that lvl 4 to be as effective as possible
beware of bushes, dont 1st rashly, know when to properly use skills

emblems.emblem_desc:
You can go for assassin or mage depending on your play style. CD reduction for Mage, Penetration for Assassin

as mentioned in the guide, her damage was nerfed previously hence rupture

wilderness blessing for extra MS when ganking or chasing

and lethal ignition for the deadly combo
emblems.emblem_title: One Wave Is All It Takes

equips.equip_desc:
Genius wand is what you want to pick up after Arcane Boots
Your 1, 2, 3 combo is enough to trigger its passive
sky piercer if 3 or 4 softies are present on the enemy team, otherwise, replace it with holy crystal as a last item or wishing lantern depending on how tanky your foes are
divine glaive as a 3rd item can be picked up too if enemy picks up early magic defense

hero.hero_overview:
Kadita is an amazing burst mage. Play her in mid lane.
first you wanna help your jungle with the buff before going to mid lane. Try to clear your lane as fast as you can to gank top or bottom whichever you deem necessary
hero.hero_strength: After the lastest patch, Kadita's clearing capability has become somewhat slow so try to get help from your roam to fast clear mid and gank. She is strong early - late if the enemy didn't go for athena or other anti bursts. Her survivability is amazing. She can be both an initiator with her first, and a finisher with her ult.
hero.hero_weakness: She can start becoming more of a disabler/cc rather than a burst when it comes to mid-late game when enemy team starts picking up athena so make sure to trigger their athena first or combo them with a help of a teammate to ensure the kill.

data.recommend: Kadita has been off Meta recently, my guide might help you recover those stars😋

spell.spell_desc:
Some might go for Flicker but Petrify is my go-to spell, especially after the latest update where her knock up time got shortened.

Note: When going in 1v5 to initiate a team fight, it's better to just 1st+petrify instead of using 2nd after petrify to avoid enemy team cc

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kadita is more compatible with heroes who have great cc such as Atlas, because it will help her cast her combo effectively during team fights.

counters.counter_desc: Kadita is best to work with tanks with cc skills such as Tigreal, greatly enhancing her impact during team fights.

dominants.dominant_desc: Kadita is quite weak during early team fights, so it's  crucial to know how to properly use her skills. She is strong in mid to late stages of the game

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set is suitable for hereos with great burst ability such as Kadita, because it helps her boost her bursting capabilities to such squishy and back liner heroes during team fights.

equips.equip_desc: This build is suitable for Kadita in order to enhanced her bursting capabilities during mid to late stages of the game.

hero.hero_overview: Kadita has been popular recently because of the buff she got. Although, her second skill got a slight nerfed, toning down her cc potential, but in compensation, the developers buffed her first skill and ultimate for a faster and smoother casting experience.
hero.hero_strength: Kadita is strong against heroes who lack mobility such as Aurora and Eudora because they will be having a hard time to escape to her second skill, which is usually a major set up for her ultimate. In addition to that, her first skill grants her cc immunity so she can also counter such heroes who usually rely on their cc skill(s).
hero.hero_weakness: Despite having a good mobility and cc immunity, Kadita is weak against heroes who had multiple crowd control such as Fredrinn, and she is also weak against heroes with cc immunity skill such as diggie and martis. Lastly, she is weak against heroes with suppression like Kaha etc.

data.recommend: This is a good recommendation for those Kadita users!

spell.spell_desc: Flicker would be a compatible spell for Kadita, helping her cast her ultimate effectively during team fights especially against those heroes with high mobility. Although, a petrify would also be good because it greatly helps her in performing her combo effectively.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Karena chip bisa menjadi salah satu opsi yang terbaik karena chip adalah Hero yang suka nabrak dan kita bisa memanfaatkan ULTI dan CC dari chip

counters.counter_desc: Ruby juga bisa menjadi opsi exp yang bagus karena Ruby adalah Hero yang banyak CC dan bukan itu saja Ruby juga bisa lebih gampang untuk melakukan ganking ke mmakrsman Hero lawan karena Ruby memiliki pasif escape+skill yang full cc

Nolan juga bisa menjadi salah satu opsi yang bagus untuk menjadi Hero pengisi jungler karena Hero Nolan memiliki burst damage yang cukup tinggi,dan Nolan bagus juga menjadi opsi counter Hero Hero yang tipis apalagi sekarang lagi meta hero assassin hyper
Natan juga bisa menjadi opsi Hero pemegang Hero late game yang dimana Natan bisa menanggung tim kawan untuk menang di late game karena Natan memiliki dame yang cukup tinggi

dominants.dominant_desc: Disaat roamer musuh mendapat kan momen kita sebagai Hero mage yang suka ngelock usahakan incar Hero yang ada di back line roamer musuh yang inisiasi untuk nge back up roam mereka,dan kewajiban kita disini yaitu mencegah pergerakan musuh yang mau ngeback up roamer mereka

emblems.emblem_desc: Ini bisa menjadi opsi untuk lebih gampang ngelock Hero lawan

equips.equip_desc: Dengan item ini Kadita bisa lebih over power(OP) tetapi tombak ilahi bisa diganti dengan sky piecer(jika power kita sudah lebih tinggi di bandingkan tim lawan)

Opsi item ini bisa digunakan saat tim lawan banyak menggunakan Hero magic defense dan untuk Hero yang tebal tetapi holy crystal yang di akhir bisa juga di ganti dengan blood swing bila ada Hero yang Yang suka Nabrak atau Hero yang bertipe lock target
equips.equip_title: Counter untuk Hero banyak magic dafense

hero.hero_overview: Farm Kadita,saat awal main hanya cukup bermain di mid,sambil mencari level up=level 3,tetapi saat jungler musuh di rusuh sama tim kita sendiri kita harus objektif untuk membantu tim ,dan sebaliknya di saat jungler tim sendiri dirusuh maka langsung saja objektif ke arah jungle tim,dan saat Kadita sudah level 4 maka lebih Banyakin untuk mengegank mm musuh
hero.hero_strength: Di awal permainan Kadita tidak cukup banyak damage yang di berikan ke musuh maka Kadita sangat tergantung oleh ULTI dan equipment jadi saat diawal permainan Kadita wajib menjadikan sepatu magic terlebih dahulu,karena sepatu magic memberi kan pineraction yang tinggi saat di awal game
hero.hero_weakness: Kelemahan Kadita hanya ada di Hero full CC atau suprise yang berlebihan dan Kadita juga bisa di counter sama Hero yang suka nabrak nabrak Hero backline

data.recommend: Gunakan dengan sebaik mungkin yang teman teman 😇🙏🙏
